source_id.description: Stable identifier of the upstream knowledge source.

document_id.description: Stable identifier of a normalized source document.

chunk_id.description: Stable identifier of a chunk derived from a document.

query_id.description: Identifier of a single user or system query request.

trace_id.description: Identifier grouping all events/spans in one execution trace.

dataset_id.description: Logical identifier of a curated dataset.

dataset_version.description: Immutable version of a curated dataset snapshot.

model_version.description: Explicit model version used to produce runtime outputs.
